name: powerspaces
title: Powerspaces
description: Search any app and open or focus it on the desktop (Space) you're currently on, via the powerspaces CLI.
author: sebastianpdw

commands.name: open-on-current-space
commands.title: Open on Current Space
commands.subtitle: Powerspaces
commands.description: Search apps and open/focus them on the Space you're standing on — never jumps you to another desktop.

preferences.name: powerspacesBin
preferences.title: powerspaces CLI
preferences.description: Absolute path to the powerspaces binary that the extension shells out to.
